posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve asked real project managers, consultants, and monday.com ambassadors to share their biggest “aha” moments on monday.com💡
Whether you’re a monday.com champion or just getting started, you’ll definitely discover some hidden gem features in my new article 10 Tips I Wish I Knew When I Started Using monday.com.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml: If you prefer watching instead of reading, I’ve shared these tips in a YouTube video as well.
